title: Comforting Crispy German Chicken Drumsticks Roast
description: Savory and comforting German dish featuring crispy chicken drumsticks and a delicious roast, perfect for a paleo-friendly dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together almond flour, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the almond flour mixture.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken drumsticks until browned on all sides.
Transfer the chicken drumsticks to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Flip the chicken drumsticks over and continue roasting for an additional 15 minutes, or until crispy and cooked through.
Remove the chicken drumsticks from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
